examples: As she walked down the path in front of the house, she bent stiffly, raised her fists and hit thorns and honeysuckle all the way.
One side was dense honeysuckle, and the other was open and slanted down to a telescoped view of the city. The white cloud was directly in front of them.
Roses and honeysuckle entwine the little cottage.
Johnson's inventive soloing is especially well-featured on "Honeysuckle Rose, " done on a quartet session in 1937.
Without looking she can chart his movement towards the house by the heady fragrance of honeysuckle.
